# Fixture Inventory Placeholder

This directory will contain small redistributable fixture artifacts for the MVP matrix.

Planned fixture IDs:
- `fx_add_elf64`
- `fx_switch_elf64`
- `fx_runtime_data_min`
- `fx_corrupt_bin`

Manifest requirements when binaries are added:
- fixture id
- source recipe
- SHA256
- expected architecture/format
- upstream pin used when generated
- license/redistribution note
